series_metadata.series_description: Pleadings/Notices/transcripts/hearing records/exhibits/orders/decisions associated with individual appeals filed with the board. After a final determination has been made, these materials are retained in the board''s offices for 12 months and then destroyed.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office from date of final order of BTA or in event order is appealed court pursuant O.R.C. 5717.04, 60 days final determination by court
